jobDescription.title: Senior Python Developer
requirements: REST API design and best practices
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP or Azure)
responsibilities: Collaborate with data engineers on Databricks pipelines
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
Write technical documentation and API specs

employmentHistory.title: Software Developer
employmentHistory.description: Developed REST APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Led migration of legacy services to microservices architecture. Mentored two junior engineers.

employmentHistory.title: Junior Python Developer

jsonCvTextExtracted.rawText:
Juan Perez — Software Developer

Experience:
TechCorp Inc. (2020–present): Developed REST APIs with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Led microservices migration. Mentored junior engineers.
StartupXYZ (2016–2020): Python scripting, Django maintenance, 10k daily users.

Education:
B.Sc. Computer Science — Universidad Nacional, Argentina (2015)

Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, Django, Redis
Certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate
Languages: Spanish (native), English (advanced)
